description: Marriage contract in which a widow contributes one sixth of a house from a previous marriage and stands surety for her husband in case he is sued by her two sons and/or a fourth party in the house, a Muslim. Drafted by judge Natan b. Shemuel (in office ca. 1140-1147) in Tevet 1459/November-December 1147. Validated (or witnessed?) by Ḥiyyā b. Yiṣḥaq, David ha-Palit (the refugee) b. Yosef, and Natan b. Shemuel. (Information from Goitein, Mediterranean Society, III, p. 386, item 9)
description_he: חוזה נישואין שבו אלמנה תורמת שישית בית מנישואיה הקודמים ומערבת ערבות לבעלה. נוסח על ידי השופט נתן ב' שמואל, טבת 1459 = נובמבר-דצמבר 1147.
